subcodes.first_line: O candle of the love of God! In this world of nothingness which presenteth the semblance of being, seek thou a true existence and in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله در این عالم نیستی که هستی نماست یک وجود حقیقی بجو و در این
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence
